meta.question: Does this model contain any event-based gateways? (Model ID: f404135647444aedabe98bb54c000517)
meta.finalAnswer: Yes, the model with ID f404135647444aedabe98bb54c000517 contains one event-based gateway (URI: https://www.teamingai-project.eu/kg/process/qualityInspection/sid-D7738C6D-63A4-4D42-BCC4-47597AC64A74).

request.query:
prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?gateway ?name WHERE {
  ?model a bboExt:Model .
  ?model tai:originalId "f404135647444aedabe98bb54c000517" .
  ?definitions tai:belongsTo ?model .
  ?choreo tai:belongsTo ?definitions .
  ?gateway tai:belongsTo ?choreo .
  ?gateway a bboExt:EventBasedGateway .
  OPTIONAL { ?gateway bbo:name ?name . }
}

request.reason: The query successfully identified one event-based gateway in the specified model.

request.answer: Yes, the model with ID f404135647444aedabe98bb54c000517 contains one event-based gateway (URI: https://www.teamingai-project.eu/kg/process/qualityInspection/sid-D7738C6D-63A4-4D42-BCC4-47597AC64A74).
